title: About

preview.teaser: Engineer of Atmosphere LLC is a portfolio company of the NTI Fund. We specialize in developing and manufacturing technological educational products.

description: Engineer of Atmosphere LLC is a portfolio company of the National Technology Initiative Fund. We specialize in developing and manufacturing technological educational products: laboratory complexes, interactive educational programs, and adaptive learning methodologies.
founders: The company was founded by engineers of the Central Aerohydrodynamic Institute (TsAGI) named after Professor N.E. Zhukovsky — one of the world's largest centers of aviation science.
mission: Our mission is to make a significant contribution to developing human capital in the aviation industry. Our key goal is to expand the boundaries of scientific research and make it more accessible within Russia's priority areas of scientific and technological development.
training: More than 10,000 young specialists, students and schoolchildren have gained practical skills using our equipment, mastering the fundamentals of aerodynamics, structural analysis and aircraft design, laying the foundation for future achievements in the aviation industry.
award: The CEO of Engineer of Atmosphere LLC became a laureate of the First National Award 'People Change the Country'.

quote.name: Vladimir Vladimirovich Putin
quote.title: President of the Russian Federation
quote.text: Unmanned aerial systems are one of the key areas of technological development. We need qualified specialists capable of designing and testing next-generation aircraft.
